stateAfter.text:
{
  "url": "https://www.bing.com/webmasters/about?siteUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fscreenhand.com&from=sitemaps%3FsiteUrl%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fscreenhand.com",
  "title": "Bing Webmaster Tools",
  "bodySample": "Help
EN

Sign In
Want more users for your site?
Get your site's performance data, take advantage of free SEO/GEO tools and analyse insights to improve your page rankings on Bing search results.
Get started
Get insights into your site
Understand what leads people to your site, what people are searching for and focus on increasing traffic to your site with our reports and tools and get personalised messages and alerts for your sites.
Dashboard
SEO/GEO tools
Reporting tools
Diagnostic tools
Communication
Sign Up 
to see more insights
SEO/GEO features
Our unique SEO/GEO tools let you explore your site, analyse backlinks, manage keywords and more to help your website reach your targeted users fast and first.

Backlinks
Your sites backlink profile helps analyse the referring pages, domains and anchor texts

Keyword research
Keyword Research allows you to check the phrases and keywords that searchers are querying for and their corresponding search volumes.

SEO/GEO Report
SEO/GEO reports contain aggregated counts of all the errors found across the entire website scanned and total pages containing errors

Site Scan
Site Scan is an on-demand site audit tool which crawls your site and checks for common technical SEO/GEO issues.
Get started for free

Do more with your site
Take a look at our extended features and public tools that help you manage your site
Wordpress Plugin for URL Submission
Bing URL Submission Plugin for WordPress enables automated submission of URLs from WordPress sites to the Bing index.
Learn more

Mobile friendly
Check if your site is mobile friendly with the Bing Mobile Friendliness tool
Learn more

Know more about Webmaster
We have you covered on all your queries with our support ecosystem and extensive documentation.

Guidelines
The Bing Webmaste",
  "successHint": false
}
